examples: On the whole she had lived modestly, with a notable lack of ostentation.
Forsake your greed, abandon your appetites of ostentation.
Choose a life of action, not one of ostentation. (C.Nepos).
After a decade of President Carlos Menem's brash ostentation, Mr de la Rua's greyness appeals.
Among the next generation is George Clooney, whose suits are usually dark in color and devoid of ostentation.
